thinks.think: A man with a beard and short dark hair, wearing a light green t-shirt, stands in a kitchen. He starts with an open-mouthed smile. His expression changes to a closed-mouth smile, showing his teeth, while his head tilts slightly. The background remains static with kitchen shelves and hanging pots visible.

The view cuts to a close-up of golden-brown, textured cookies resting on a silver wire cooling rack. Several round biscuits, appearing to contain oats, sit on a dark countertop. A blurred bowl of white ingredients is visible in the background. The camera angle shifts slightly, showing a different arrangement of the baked goods on the rack.

The scene shifts to show the golden-brown cookies arranged in a dark woven basket lined with a white cloth napkin. A stack of textured biscuits sits on the left, while individual cookies rest separately on the fabric, displaying the baked goods' crispy, oat-filled surfaces.

The video cuts back to the man in the light green t-shirt standing in the kitchen. He starts with eyes closed and lips pressed, then opens his eyes and raises both hands outward in a gesture. The kitchen background with hanging pots and shelves remains visible behind him throughout the shot.

The man in the light green t-shirt smiles at the camera. The scene then cuts to a close-up of a hand holding a clear glass bowl containing chunks of pale yellow butter. Blurred white bowls and ingredients are visible on the dark countertop in the background.

A YouTube interface overlay appears in the top left corner displaying channel information and a red subscribe button. Simultaneously, a hand pours a white, granular ingredient from a small glass dish into the larger clear bowl containing chunks of pale yellow butter.

A hand finishes pouring white granular ingredients from a small glass dish into a larger bowl containing butter chunks. The empty dish is lifted away. In the top left corner, a cursor clicks the red subscribe button on a YouTube overlay, changing it to a grey subscribed status and activating the notification bell icon.

A white bowl pours a fine white powder into the clear glass mixing bowl, forming a mound over the previous ingredients. The YouTube subscription overlay disappears from the top left corner. Blurred kitchen items, including a jar of oats and an oil bottle, remain visible in the background.

A hand tilts a clear glass jar secured with a silver metal clasp, pouring a thick stream of dry rolled oats into the bowl. The oats fall onto the existing pile of white powder and butter, adding a coarse texture to the mixture as the jar empties.

Pouring continues from the glass jar until the scene cuts to the bowl filled with oats. A close-up of the clear glass bowl contains a large pile of rolled oats. The oats cover the white powder and butter chunks. The dry ingredients settle together in the container. The hand and jar disappear from view.

A stream of white granulated sugar pours into the clear glass bowl, landing on top of the pile of rolled oats. The white mound grows larger as the ingredient flows down from above, covering the center of the oat mixture within the transparent container. The pouring action continues covering the dry ingredients below.

The view cuts to a close-up of a hand holding a silver metal measuring spoon filled with a small mound of fine white powder. The spoon is positioned directly above the glass mixing bowl containing the oats and sugar mixture. A blurred glass jar filled with oats is visible in the background behind the spoon.

A metal measuring spoon holds white powder over the bowl before a wooden spoon appears to stir the contents. The wooden utensil mixes the rolled oats and white granules inside the clear glass bowl. The hand moves the spoon to blend the components together thoroughly on the dark countertop in the kitchen.

A wooden spoon mixes the dry ingredients, blending the rolled oats with the white sugar and flour inside the clear glass bowl. The spoon moves through the mixture, coating the oats and combining everything into a uniform, crumbly texture on the dark kitchen countertop.

The wooden spoon continues mixing the dry ingredients within the clear glass bowl. The rolled oats and white powders are thoroughly combined into a uniform, crumbly consistency. The camera maintains a close-up perspective on the bowl's interior as the spoon moves through the mixture on the dark countertop.

A wooden spoon, coated in fine white powder, is lifted from the glass bowl containing the mixed dry ingredients. In the background, a glass jar filled with oats and a small white ramekin become clearly visible on the dark countertop as the spoon moves away.

The glass bowl with mixed dry ingredients stays in the foreground. The camera reveals a silver saucepan on a white and pink striped cloth to the left. In the background, bottles of oil on a red tray and a large glass jar filled with oats are now visible on the counter.

The camera cuts to a close-up of the silver saucepan resting on the striped cloth. Inside, melted yellow butter with white solids is visible. A thin stream of golden amber liquid pours into the mixture, creating ripples on the surface. The glass bowl with dry ingredients is partially visible in the top right corner.

A metal spoon pours a thick, golden amber liquid into the stainless steel saucepan containing melted butter. The viscous stream mixes with the yellow fat and white solids resting on the striped cloth. The glass bowl with dry ingredients stays partially visible in the upper right corner as the pouring continues.

After the golden liquid is poured, a pink spatula enters the stainless steel saucepan containing melted butter. The utensil begins to stir the mixture, blending the amber syrup into the yellow fat and white solids resting on the striped cloth. The camera focuses closely on the swirling liquids inside the metal pot.

A pink spatula stirs golden syrup and melted butter inside a silver saucepan. Ingredients blend into a swirling yellow fluid with white solids on a striped cloth. The camera keeps a close-up view of the mixing process.

A pink spatula stirs the golden liquid mixture inside the silver saucepan. The camera cuts to the glass bowl with dry ingredients. The silver saucepan is then tilted above the bowl, pouring the melted butter and syrup mixture onto the dry oat and flour blend.

A silver saucepan tilts over a clear glass bowl containing dry oat and flour mixture. A steady stream of golden-yellow liquid pours from the pan into the bowl, landing on the dry ingredients. The flow continues, transitioning from a thick stream to a thinner trickle as the pouring action proceeds.

The silver saucepan tilts further, releasing the final drops of the golden liquid mixture into the glass bowl. The yellow stream ceases, leaving a distinct pool of melted butter and syrup resting atop the dry oat and flour blend in the center of the clear bowl.

A clear glass bowl holds dry ingredients topped with a pool of yellow liquid. A hand holding a silver spoon pours a small amount of dark brown liquid into the center of the yellow pool. The dark liquid settles into the mixture, creating a distinct dark spot.

A wooden spoon enters the clear glass bowl from the right, beginning to stir the mixture. It blends the dry oat and flour ingredients with the central pool of yellow liquid and dark extract. The spoon moves through the contents, initiating the combination of wet and dry components within the bowl.

A wooden spoon vigorously stirs the contents of the clear glass bowl, blending the dry oats with the yellow liquid and dark extract. The ingredients combine into a cohesive, sticky mass as the spoon moves through them. A hand appears on the right side, holding the bowl steady during the mixing process.

A wooden spoon mixes the ingredients in a glass bowl, blending the oats and liquid into a uniform, crumbly texture. A hand holds the bowl steady on the right side. The spoon lifts a portion of the mixture, showing its cohesive, dough-like consistency.

The scene changes to show a rectangular metal baking tray lined with white parchment paper. A hand holds the right side of the tray, placing it on the dark countertop. Blurred kitchen items, including oil bottles and the silver saucepan, are visible in the background behind the tray.

The scene widens to show the baking tray lined with white paper on the right. A clear glass bowl filled with the mixed oat crumble is now central in the foreground. In the background left, a silver saucepan and a glass jar of oats sit on the dark countertop.

Two hands enter the frame and reach into the central glass bowl containing the oat mixture. The fingers grasp a handful of the crumbly texture, lifting and manipulating the ingredients above the rest of the contents near the parchment-lined baking tray.

Two hands press and squeeze the crumbly oat mixture inside the clear glass bowl. The fingers manipulate the ingredients, compacting the loose crumbs into a cohesive texture. The parchment-lined baking tray sits stationary on the right side of the dark countertop.

After pressing the ingredients, a hand holds a formed, round ball of the textured oat mixture above the glass bowl. The parchment-lined baking tray remains visible on the right side of the dark countertop. The mixture appears cohesive and bound together, ready to be placed on the sheet.

A hand holds a formed, textured ball of oat mixture above the glass bowl. The view cuts to a parchment-lined baking tray holding several similar oat balls. A hand reaches in to place another formed ball onto the center of the sheet, joining the others arranged in rows.

A hand places a formed ball of the crumbly oat mixture onto the center of the parchment-lined baking sheet, joining several other similar mounds already arranged in rows. The hand withdraws, leaving the textured dough balls spaced apart on the metal tray.

A hand places a formed ball of crumbly oat mixture onto the center of the parchment-lined baking sheet, joining other similar mounds arranged in rows. The hand withdraws, leaving the textured dough balls spaced apart on the metal tray.

A metal baking tray lined with white parchment paper rests on a dark countertop, displaying nine distinct mounds of the textured oat mixture arranged in three rows. The hand is absent, showing the placement process is finished. The unbaked cookies are spaced evenly apart across the sheet.

A rectangular metal baking tray lined with white parchment paper rests on a black countertop, displaying nine distinct, unbaked mounds of textured oat mixture. The cookies are spaced apart in three rough rows, remaining stationary as the camera holds the shot.

A hand guides the metal baking tray lined with white parchment paper and holding nine unbaked oat mounds onto a wire rack inside an open oven. The dark oven interior is illuminated, highlighting the raw cookies as they are positioned centrally on the rack for baking.

The metal baking tray carrying the nine unbaked oat mounds is pushed fully onto the wire rack inside the lit oven. The tray rests securely on the rack within the dark oven cavity, displaying the raw cookies spaced apart on the white parchment paper lining.

The metal baking tray rests on the wire rack inside the warm, illuminated oven interior. Nine pale, textured oat mounds remain stationary on the white parchment paper. The raw cookies are spaced evenly apart, sitting within the dark cavity as the baking process is about to commence.

Inside the illuminated oven, the baking tray remains on the wire rack. The nine oat mounds have transformed from pale dough into golden-brown, baked cookies with a textured surface. The warm light highlights the cooked treats resting on the white parchment paper.

Inside the illuminated oven, nine golden-brown, textured oat cookies rest on a parchment-lined baking tray. A hand wearing a blue and white striped oven mitt reaches into the frame from the left, grasping the edge of the metal tray to remove the baked cookies.

A hand wearing a blue and white striped oven mitt pulls the metal baking tray containing golden-brown cookies out of the illuminated oven. Simultaneously, a digital YouTube interface overlay appears in the top left corner, displaying a cursor clicking a red subscribe button next to the channel name Warren Nash.

The view shifts to a thick wooden cutting board resting on a black countertop, with a large glass jar of oats and oil bottles visible in the background. A YouTube overlay in the top left corner displays a cursor clicking the notification bell icon next to a grey "SUBSCRIBED" button.

A metal baking tray lined with white parchment paper, holding golden-brown baked oat cookies, is placed onto the wooden cutting board. In the top left corner, a YouTube interface overlay remains visible, displaying a grey 'SUBSCRIBED' button and a notification bell icon next to the channel name.

A metal baking tray lined with parchment paper holds golden-brown oat cookies on a wooden board. The YouTube interface overlay in the top-left corner vanishes. In the background, bottles of oil on a red tray and a glass jar of oats sit on the dark countertop.

The view transitions to a split-screen outro layout. On the right, a large orange panel displays white text "MORE VIDEOS YOU'LL LOVE..." and "CLICK TO SUBSCRIBE" with a white placeholder box. On the left, a smaller video frame shows a hand using a metal spatula to lift a cookie, beneath an orange "WARREN NASH" banner.

The right panel features a solid orange background with white text "MORE VIDEOS YOU'LL LOVE..." above a white rectangle and "CLICK TO SUBSCRIBE" with a curved arrow.
